home.heroDesc: StartupIQ uses advanced AI to validate your ideas, find the perfect co-founders, and analyze market trends in seconds.
home.ideaValidatorDesc: Check if your startup idea is viable. Get SWOT analysis and AI feedback instantly.
home.ideaGeneratorDesc: Stuck? Let AI brainstorm unique startup concepts based on your interests.
home.valuationToolDesc: Estimate your startup's pre-money valuation using industry data and ML models.
home.talentScoutDesc: Find real developers from GitHub (India) and check team compatibility with AI.
home.marketTrendsDesc: Visualize growth charts, competitor analysis, and sentiment for any industry.
home.competitorAnalysisDesc: Identify top competitors, their strengths, weaknesses, and market positioning.
home.businessCanvasDesc: Auto-generate a complete Business Model Canvas for your startup idea.
